source: Pitchfork 66 Most Anticipated Tours of Spring 2026 (Mar 24, 2026)
crossRef: NME 100, Consequence Emerging Artists, Rolling Stone, Billboard

artists.name: MJ Lenderman & Waxahatchee
artists.note: Co-headlining run. MJ Lenderman is Pitchfork darling, Waxahatchee is indie royalty. Playing Beacon Theatre NYC, Auditorium Theatre Chicago.
artists.signal: HIGH — indie crossover, opening for Zach Bryan

artists.name: Ari Lennox
artists.note: Left Dreamville, Vacancy album, first tour since 2022. Seattle to Brooklyn.
artists.signal: HIGH — major R&B, 3+ year touring gap = pent-up demand

artists.name: Lambrini Girls
artists.note: Brighton UK punks. NME 100 2026, Coachella, first NA headlining tour. Consequence Rookie of Year 2025.
artists.signal: HIGH — UK breakout + NME + Coachella + punk hype cycle

artists.name: fakemink
artists.note: Frank Ocean cosign, Gucci runway, Dante's Inferno-inspired album. Coachella to CLOUT Festival. Pitchfork called him 'UK underground crown prince.'
artists.signal: VERY HIGH — we already track this artist, $184 uniform pricing, A-tier VIP

artists.name: Black Country, New Road
artists.note: Post-Isaac Wood era, Forever Howlong album, Horsegirl opening. Second NA run.
artists.signal: MEDIUM — dedicated fanbase but niche experimental

artists.name: Qveen Herby
artists.note: ENTIRE tour sold out. Venue upgrade in Denver. Hollywood Palladium, Fillmore Minneapolis.
artists.signal: VERY HIGH — full sellout + venue upgrades = confirmed demand

artists.name: Dijon
artists.note: Dedicated fanbase, shows sell out. Opening for Zach Bryan on stadium dates. Own headline run at theaters.
artists.signal: HIGH — Zach Bryan support + own headline = spike signal

artists.name: Jalen Ngonda
artists.note: Daptone Records. Elton John said 'he will be a huge star.' Sold-out US/UK/EU tours. Second album Doctrine of Love (June 2026). Club stages → arenas trajectory.
artists.signal: VERY HIGH — UK breakout pattern + Daptone pedigree + critical acclaim

artists.name: Alabama Shakes
artists.note: Reunion after 7+ years. No new music since 2015. 2025 comeback + 2026 Red Rocks x2. Also supporting Zach Bryan.
artists.signal: HIGH — reunion premium, Sound & Color nostalgia

artists.name: Dry Cleaning
artists.note: UK post-punk, Cate Le Bon-produced Secret Love album.

artists.name: Fcukers
artists.note: Governor's Ball 2026, debut album Ö, no NYC headline dates on purpose.
artists.signal: WATCH — too small/niche for secondary market currently

artists.name: The Beths
artists.note: New Zealand. Straight Line Was a Lie tour. Gov Ball → East Coast → Midwest.

artists.name: American Football
artists.note: LP4 announcement, extensive tour, 20+ year international fanbase. Midwest emo originators.
artists.signal: HIGH — reunion/legacy + LP4 hype + emo nostalgia wave

artists.name: Belle and Sebastian
artists.note: 30th anniversary of Tigermilk + If You're Feeling Sinister. Two nights per city.
artists.signal: MEDIUM-HIGH — anniversary premium, 2-night format limits supply

artists.name: Band of Horses
artists.note: 20th anniversary Everything All the Time. 'The Funeral' nostalgia.
artists.signal: MEDIUM — anniversary tour but limited secondary demand historically

highestPriorityForBB: Jalen Ngonda (UK breakout + Daptone + Elton cosign)
Lambrini Girls (UK punk breakout + NME + Coachella)
Dijon (Zach Bryan support + own headline = spike signal)
